description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/berublan/vscode-log-viewer, define stages build and test, and set the DISPLAY variable to :99.0. Cache the node_modules/ and .vscode-test/ directories. In the build stage add a build job that runs pnpm run clean, pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm add --global @vscode/vsce, pnpm run package, pnpm run build, and pnpm run lint, and publishes artifacts that expire in 15 mins with paths node_modules/, out/, dist/, and any *.vsix files. In the test stage add three jobs—test insiders, test minimum, and test stable—each executing Xvfb -ac $DISPLAY & followed by pnpm run test insiders, pnpm run test minimum, and pnpm run test stable respectively. All jobs run on every branch without additional rules.
